An easy-to-wear essential sandal, but luxuriously fashioned in crosta suede, you will slip into this style for errands at home or strolls on vacation.

products.title: Etheria Red

The subtle lug detailing on the bottom provides grip and a robust look. Etheria is perfect for summer days and nights.

It's built on the Footbed sole, our most contoured and comfortable sole, that also gives a distinctly modern aesthetic. Pair with simple summer separates.

products.title: The Slipper Brown
products.description: The shape of The Slipper is inspired by a traditional house shoe – they're elegant and simple, but they still make a statement. Our latest version casts the slipper in open-weave raffia with contrasting vachetta leather trims to create a shoe that's made for summer, but also perfect for the transitional period either side.

products.title: Theano Off White
products.description: Theano is a classic style that you’ll want to pack year after year, and wear summer after summer. The backstrap and signature winged buckle hold the foot in place, while the straps that go across the foot also encircle the big toe, echoing a toe-ring style. Theano is built on our classic flat leather sole, for a streamlined 'barely there' aesthetic.

products.title: The Slipper Cotto
products.description: The Slipper has a quiet luxury aesthetic that you love. Inspired by a traditional house shoe, they are soft, elegant and simple, but still make a statement. This version is crafted in our super-soft oiled vachetta leather, with a matte finish. There is nowhere you won’t want to wear The Slipper, but the subtle finish of this version makes a perfect partner to love-worn denim. Choose your shade.

The subtle lug detailing on the bottom provides grip and a robust look. Etheria is perfect for summer days and nights.

Perfect for those who like to tie a shoe just as they want it rather than be confined by straps or buckles, this sandal has a gladiatorial elegance that just asks to be showcased on a Mediterranean getaway.

products.title: Omonia Sabot Off White
products.description: The Omonia is a straightforward style, with its low platform and single strap with signature buckle. All our clogs feature a lightweight wooden sole, soft padded insole and anti-slip rubber grip for a comfortable, wearable clog. The Omonia in leather and canvas complements simple outfits like lightweight linens or relaxed suiting.

products.title: Omonia Sabot Black
products.description: The Omonia Sabot is available in black and a new patent, silver mirror as well as an ombré ’Tropical Summer’ leather. This updated open clog style has been created on a lower wooden structure with the adjustable new buckle featuring the AGS wing. Please note we do not accept returns on Sale products.

products.description: Like all our sandals, the Eygenia are handmade in Greece and exude all of the traditional charm you would expect. Please note we do not accept returns on Sale products.

products.title: Tessa Natural
products.description: Ancient Greek Sandals’ Tessa style showcases a vinyl slide decorated with crystals. Slide into these sandals and feel the sparkle! Please note we do not accept returns on Sale products.

products.title: Victory Of Samothrace Gold
products.description: The magnificent wings of The Winged Victory of Samothrace found in the Louvre, has inspired this detailed driven style. Using real feathers painted in gold, to sit around the ankle [similar to our much loved Ikaria style] . With a front facing clasp and gold vachetta leather strips at the base of the foot, this unique style is sure to catch the eyes of passers by.

products.title: Sphinx Off White
products.description: The Sphinx, an off white sandal featuring a strap across the foot and a toe loop, held together with ceramic beads featured on an elaborate attic geometric amphora found in The Louvre. This is one simple statement sandal.

products.title: Kore Of Berlin Metallic Mix
products.description: The Kore of Berlin - reminiscent of our iconic Desmos style – with an interlocking meet-in-the-middle criss cross on the base of the foot. This stylish slide sandal features interlocking loops that mimic the patterned robes worn by the Kore of Berlin in the Altes Museum.

products.title: Figurine Of Viotia Platinum
products.description: The Figurine de Viotia, encases the foot in a criss-cross platinum vachetta leather style. Covering the base of the foot and trailing up the ankle with stud detailing to fasten the sandal. The Multistrap anklet could be easily removed in order to have a fisherman sandal instead of a low gladiator. This Greek Gladiator style takes its inspiration from a statue found in the Boston Museum of Fine Art

products.title: Dame D'auxerre Natural/Gold
products.description: A subtle style that is oh-so-similar to our iconic Eleftheria Sandal, the Dame D’Auxerre is inspired by the hairstyle of the Kore D’Auxerre in the famed Louvre Mueseum. With hexagonal loops and subtle gold detailing to create this barely there sandal that subtly wraps up the foot.

products.title: Crounching Venus Off White/Gold
products.description: The Crouching Venus sandal, a paired back chic off-white style with subtle gold snake-style gold frame looping as an anklet, weaving it’s way across the front of the ankle. This sandal is inspired by the snake bracelet seen on the arm of the Statue of the Crouching Venus in the Jean Paul Getty Museum.

products.title: Caryatid Off White/Gold
products.description: The Caryatid, a slip on slide style inspired by the draped skirt of the ‘sought after’ Caryatid style found in the British Museum. This super chic slide has ruched leather vachetta detailing with a small plait detailing along the edge of the sandal.
